category_sources: source_facts.description: Load testing for HTTP, PostgreSQL, Jabber, and others.
display_name_sources: Official repository and project references brand the project as Tsung.
docs_sources: Official Tsung repository points users to the Tsung user manual; official GitHub README is a secondary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/processone/tsung; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable list identify Tsung as a load-testing/benchmarking tool for HTTP, PostgreSQL, Jabber, and other protocols.
